about.description: Full-stack developer and Tech Lead with a focus on building scalable backend architectures and ML-integrated applications. Experienced in leading technical teams, managing end-to-end student projects, and delivering robust API solutions using modern frameworks.

experience.title: Full Stack Developer
experience.description: Developing and maintaining full-stack web applications, designing scalable backend APIs, collaborating with QA and project teams, and contributing to requirement analysis and system improvements.

experience.title: Tech Lead
experience.description: Leading the technical team and architecture for student-led projects. Designed and deployed a Task Manager system with automated reminders and currently overseeing the official SC-CSE website development.

experience.title: Tech-Team Member
experience.description: Contributing to technical workshops and building web applications to support the Google Developer Groups campus community.

experience.title: Junior Software Developer Intern
experience.description: Developed complete backend solutions using Strapi. Integrated REST APIs and content models to enable reliable data exchange for client-facing applications.

experience.title: Tech-Team Member
experience.description: Supported frontend and backend development for community initiatives and assisted in technical event organization.

projects.title: GLOF Risk Intelligence
projects.description: Hackathon winner (Best Innovative Project). An ML-driven system for early detection of Glacial Lake Outburst Flood risks using Scikit-learn and XGBoost for classification.

projects.title: Smart Attendance Monitoring System
projects.description: Final year project (WIP). Automated attendance system using CCTV footage and face recognition (OpenCV) to log attendance without manual intervention.

projects.title: The Gnosis Week (Treasure Hunt CTF)
projects.description: Volunteer Service: Developed the backend architecture for a campus-wide CTF competition. Implemented secure data handling and a responsive challenge-solving system.

projects.title: Vaani (AICTE Initiative)
projects.description: Volunteer Service: Contributed to the official website development for the AICTE-VAANI initiative to promote technical education in regional Indian languages.

projects.title: Pain-O-Relief
projects.description: Healthcare platform providing personalized exercise routines and interactive support via chatbots and live consultations.

education.degree: Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science and Engineering
education.description: Core competencies include DS & Algorithms, Operating Systems, DBMS,Network and Compiler Design. Expertly trained in Java (OOP) and Software Engineering methodologies through project-based learning.
Scored 98% in Class 10 and 92.6% in Class 12. Secured 100 in Mathematics Standard in AISSE and 99 in Mathematics and 96 in Computer Science in AISSCE.
